No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health, well-being, or related services.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (4.3), develops practical language skills for employment (4.4), and enhances literacy through writing (4.6).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Developing 'Practical ability' and 'Basic language skills' contributes to productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities based on specific characteristics.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable urbanization or community development.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change or related actions.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine life or ocean conservation.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Learning 'Newspaper article writing' and 'Editorial/column writing' supports public access to information (16.10) and transparent institutions (16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to global partnerships or international cooperation.
